name: kinetics-0g-memory
description: Use Kinetics private memory passes and marketplace tools from Claude Desktop over the live 0G testnet.

private_key.title: 0G Private Key
private_key.description: Hex private key for the wallet Claude Desktop should use with Kinetics.

rpc_url.title: 0G RPC URL
rpc_url.description: RPC endpoint for 0G chain reads and writes.

indexer_rpc_url.title: 0G Storage Indexer URL
indexer_rpc_url.description: Indexer endpoint for 0G storage uploads and reads.

source_client.title: Client Label
source_client.description: Source client label stored in local vault state for this Claude Desktop install.
